findings.title: Pipeline Consolidation Summary
findings.description: Consolidated 36 findings from 7 agents into 25 unique findings. Removed 11 duplicates. Identified 3 cross-agent conflicts.

findings.title: Top Priority Findings
findings.description: Highest priority items based on weighted scoring (user_impact×0.35 + business_value×0.30) / (effort×0.20 + risk×0.15): Primary KPI: Daily Collaboration Sessions (score=3.593); Conduct A/B Testing on Collaboration Features (score=2.958); Competitive Positioning of Workflow Features (score=2.853); Guardrail Metric: Concurrent Edit Attempts Blocked (score=2.71); User Frustration with Document Locking (score=2.71)

top_priorities.title: Conduct A/B Testing on Collaboration Features
Guardrail Metric: Concurrent Edit Attempts Blocked

findings.title: Cross-Agent Conflict Resolution Report
findings.description: Resolved 3 conflicts between agent findings. customer-001 vs feasibility-004: Critical need for real-time co-editing conflicts with the dependency on presence indicators and conflict resolution strategy, which are prerequisites for implementation.; customer-002 vs metrics-003: User frustration with document locking may lead to an increase in blocked concurrent edit attempts, which is tracked as a guardrail metric.; requirements-010 vs intake-005: Ensuring security compliance for collaboration features may conflict with the identified compliance risks flagged in the intake findings.

evidence.excerpt: Critical need for real-time co-editing conflicts with the dependency on presence indicators and conflict resolution strategy, which are prerequisites for implementation.
User frustration with document locking may lead to an increase in blocked concurrent edit attempts, which is tracked as a guardrail metric.
Ensuring security compliance for collaboration features may conflict with the identified compliance risks flagged in the intake findings.

conflicts.description: Critical need for real-time co-editing conflicts with the dependency on presence indicators and conflict resolution strategy, which are prerequisites for implementation.
conflicts.resolution: Prioritize the development of presence indicators and finalize the conflict resolution strategy to expedite the rollout of real-time co-editing.
conflicts.reasoning: Addressing the dependencies quickly will allow for the urgent customer need to be met while managing the implementation risks.

conflicts.description: User frustration with document locking may lead to an increase in blocked concurrent edit attempts, which is tracked as a guardrail metric.
conflicts.resolution: Revise the document locking mechanism to minimize user frustration while ensuring that the number of blocked concurrent edit attempts remains within acceptable limits.
conflicts.reasoning: Improving the document locking model will enhance user satisfaction and reduce support tickets without compromising the guardrail metric.

conflicts.description: Ensuring security compliance for collaboration features may conflict with the identified compliance risks flagged in the intake findings.
conflicts.resolution: Conduct a thorough security and compliance review during the development of collaboration features to ensure all regulations are met without delaying the feature rollout.
conflicts.reasoning: Integrating compliance checks into the development process will help mitigate risks while still allowing for timely feature delivery.

summary: Consolidated 36 findings into 25 unique items. Removed 11 duplicates, resolved 3 conflicts. Top priority: Primary KPI: Daily Collaboration Sessions.
